abilities.name: Beer Goggles
abilities.text: Enemy attack actions that target this model suffer a (-) to their duel if the attacking model has a friendly Poison token.

abilities.name: Extended Reach
abilities.text: Enemy models within 2" cannot take attack actions generated by the Charge action.

abilities.name: Pass the Jug
abilities.text: The area within 2" of this model is hazardous (Poison) terrain. Friendly models may choose to be unaffected by this terrain.

actions.name: Shiner's Staff
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This action receives a (-) if the target is not engaged with this model.

triggers.name: Bar Room Brawl
triggers.text: Move this model up to 5", ignoring models. Models moved through this way gain a Poison token.

triggers.name: Feinting Strike
triggers.text: After failing, declare this action again, targeting a different model.

triggers.name: Drunken Confusion
triggers.text: Enemy models within (aura)2" of this model gain a Distracted token.

triggers.name: Draw Out Secrets
triggers.text: Make a Scheme marker in base contact with the target.

triggers.name: Healing Brew
triggers.text: Target heals 2 and gains a Poison token.

actions.name: Drunken Dash
actions.effects: Move this model up to 5", ignoring models and terrain. Models moved through this way gain a Poison token.

triggers.name: Sudden Strike
triggers.text: This model may declare a (melee) action.
